name: krambuhl
description: Agent-loop substrate: commons (foundation), loom (projects), griot (learnings), guild (panels), ev (loops), and the agent-loop-full meta-bundle.

plugins.name: commons
plugins.description: Foundation substrate: cross-cutting helpers (shared CLI lib + agent-conventions docs + interview/review skills) that the loom, guild, griot, and ev plugins all depend on. Cascades in via marketplace dependencies; consumers receive a synced local copy at install time.

plugins.name: griot
plugins.description: Learnings substrate: griot capture/use/compact CLI + griot-* skills + griot-* judge/rewriter/operator/rubric-author agents.

plugins.name: guild
plugins.description: Panel substrate: guild-validate / guild-plan / guild-spawn skills + guild CLI + plan-* / research-* / evaluator-* / implementer-* / fixer-* agents.

plugins.name: loom
plugins.description: Project substrate: loom-* skills + loom CLI for plans, research, sessions, checkins, retros, archives.

plugins.name: ev
plugins.description: Execution loops: ev-loop-confidence (tiered transforms), ev-loop-interactive (paired units), ev-run (router).

plugins.name: agent-loop-full
plugins.description: Meta-bundle: zero-content plugin that cascade-installs the full agent-loop family (commons, griot, guild, loom, ev).
